ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "user_handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the user (left-handed or right-handed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_id in the users table */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "device_screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the device */,
  "device_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_id in the users table */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "session_device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the phone_id in the devices table */,
  "session_environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authentication_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authentication log */,
  "log_session_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the session_id in the sessions table */,
  "log_user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_id in the users table */,
  "log_authentication_status" TEXT /* Status of the authentication (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "log_authentication_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the authentication occurred */,
  "log_device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the phone_id in the devices table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
